title: Prodigal
description:
ENCOUNTER dangerous monsters as you explore caves, castles, and crypts on journeying through your childhood home of Vann’s Point and beyond the world of Lyrian! 
 

OVERCOME any challenge that stands between you and redemption on your return to a now unfamiliar childhood home. Face the sins of your past and reunite with friends from years past. Even ignite new relationships as you right the wrongs that haunt you! 
 

DISCOVER mysterious secrets of those who came before as you collect fragments of long forgotten knowledge. Learn of dangerous prophecies and legends foretelling what is yet to come! 
 

• Countless ways to play: Chaos, Altars, Curses and more

• A nostalgic hybrid chiptune/organic OST

• Fun, story-building side quests

• More than a dozen dungeons 

• Extensive post-game content

• Over 24 hours of gameplay

• 10 pursuable relationships

• Over 20 bosses

• Plenty more!
description_short: Journey through a vibrant world fighting vicious monsters, exploring puzzling dungeons, and collecting magical artifacts. Unravel the mysteries of Vann's Point and bond with all of its curious townsfolk!
